title: SanDisk’s Short Interest at Record Highs —Do the Bears Know Something?
author: Sam Quirke
description: SanDisk stock has surged 4,000% in 12 months and 600% year-to-date, trading near $1,650 with record highs. The bull case centers on strong AI-driven demand for memory and storage, with $42 billion in locked supply agreements and analyst price targets ranging from $2,300 to $3,250. However, short interest has simultaneously hit record levels, suggesting informed investors see significant risk despite the stock's extraordinary gains. Recent short covering may be adding to upward momentum.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Strong fundamental bull case driven by AI-era growth, locked $42B+ supply agreements, favorable PE ratio of 58, bullish analyst upgrades (Barclays Overweight, Susquehanna $3,250 target), and development of high-bandwidth flash technology. However, sentiment is tempered by record short interest and concerns about valuation after 4,000% gains, suggesting the stock may be overextended despite solid fundamentals.
Upgraded SanDisk to Overweight rating with $2,300 price target, citing memory and storage as the most attractive vertical in semiconductor space below accelerators.
Raised SanDisk price target citing agentic AI tailwind as growth driver.

title: Qualcomm Gets Crushed: $150 Is the Level to Watch Going Forward
author: Sam Quirke
description: Qualcomm shares have plummeted 17% over seven consecutive trading sessions, erasing all 2025 gains and returning to 2020 price levels. While broader geopolitical tensions and tech sector flight contributed to the decline, the stock's technical damage is significant with a broken uptrend. However, the RSI is extremely oversold without company-specific negative catalysts, suggesting the selloff may be overdone. Analysts maintain cautious price targets around $180, indicating even skeptics believe current levels are attractive. The $150 level is key to watch for potential stabilization.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Stock has declined 17% over seven sessions, broken its uptrend, and erased all 2025 gains. However, the extreme oversold conditions (RSI at April 2025 levels) without fundamental catalysts suggest the selling may be overdone, presenting a potential contrarian opportunity for long-term investors willing to tolerate volatility.
Maintains a Neutral rating on Qualcomm with a price target around $180, suggesting current prices below $155 represent oversold conditions.
Maintains a Neutral rating on Qualcomm with a price target around $180, suggesting current prices below $155 represent oversold conditions.
Maintains a Neutral or equivalent rating with a price target around $180, suggesting the current selloff is excessive relative to fundamentals.

title: Mizuho Americas Announces $1 Million in Grants Through the Mizuho USA Foundation
author: Na
description: Mizuho USA Foundation announced $1 million in 2025 grants focused on strengthening communities and supporting young adults in technology skills training and employment opportunities. The foundation awarded a $450,000 three-year FutureReady Grant to Pursuit for an AI training initiative, $275,000 in Opportunity Grants to eleven nonprofits, and $250,250 in Community Involvement Grants to 24 organizations. Since its formation in 2003, the foundation has awarded nearly $16 million in grants.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Pursuit received significant funding ($450,000 over three years) for its innovative AI Build Corps for Nonprofits program, validating its social impact model and demonstrating strong organizational credibility in technology training and job placement.

Mizuho demonstrates strong corporate social responsibility through substantial charitable giving ($1 million in 2025 grants) and commitment to community development, particularly in technology education and youth employment. This reflects positively on the company's values and community engagement.

title: Immix Biopharma Announces Pricing of Upsized $100 Million Underwritten Offering of Common Stock and Pre-Funded Warrants
author: Mike Moyer
description: Immix Biopharma priced an underwritten offering of common stock and pre-funded warrants, expecting to raise $100 million to fund NXC-201 development and corporate operations through mid-2027.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company is raising capital to advance its clinical development, indicating strategic financial planning without clear positive or negative implications

title: 3 Signs Tesla Is Starting December on the Front Foot
author: Sam Quirke
description: Tesla shows signs of recovery in December with technical strength, positive analyst sentiment, and improving operational performance, particularly in China's EV market, despite challenges in European sales.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Stock rebounded from $385 to $430, technical indicators showing bullish signals, positive analyst ratings with price targets of $475-$508, strong performance in China with 10% year-over-year shipment growth, and plans to expand robotaxi fleet
